subject: Gaming
title: Diablo: Click, Loot, Repeat
description: A short lesson to help you apply Diablo: Click, Loot, Repeat.

hook.text: Diablo made clicking on monsters and collecting loot the most addictive loop in gaming.

buildup.text: Blizzard North created Diablo in 1996. Random dungeons and random loot meant infinite replayability.

discovery.text: Color-coded loot rarity—white, blue, yellow, gold—became the universal language of gaming rewards.

twist.text: Diablo III launched with a real-money auction house. Players sold loot for actual dollars—then Blizzard shut it down.

climax.text: The action RPG loot loop Diablo created is now used in games from Destiny to Borderlands to Genshin Impact.

punchline.text: Click, loot, repeat. Diablo made addiction into a genre.

quiz.question: What system did Diablo popularize across all of gaming?
options: Color-coded loot rarity and randomized reward loops
